nodes.text: [i]creeaakk[/i]

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Yeesh, a knock would be nice...

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: My bad, my bad. What're you even doing in here? It's like-- 2 PM.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Trying to write. It's not like you're being anymore productive than me.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: You've literally been playing Halo since 4 PM [b]yesterday[/b].

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: So? I thought you didn't care about that.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: I said I don't care what you do [i]as long[/i] as it didn't involve me... you kept me up the entire night.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: well so-rry I didn't understand you.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Whatever, I'll just go make me a cup of coffee

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: That'll wake--what's with the face... [shake rate=3 level=10] npc. [/shake]

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Uh--funny. So about that.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Are you kidding me?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: No. I broke the coffee machine.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: [shake rate=5 level=10] UGHHHHH [/shake]

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: WELL DON'T SOUND SO HAPPY ABOUT IT, DAMN.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: There, please never do that again-- by the way, [i] how [/i] did you even break it?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I dunno, I guess if you try hard enough--

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: You were [i]trying[/i] to break it?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: No! I--ugh, whatever...

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Aren't you supposed to be at a job interview right about now?

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Don't change the subject.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: [shake rate=3 level=10]IM TRYING TO HELP YOU GET A JOB.[/shake]

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Alright, alright...I'll talk to you about the coffee. [b]Later[/b].

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: See ya.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I would wish you good luck, or something, but you kinda pissed me off.

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: Well, you better enjoy the thought of being homeless if i--

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Ughhh-- good luck. [font_size=11]Bastard...[/font_size]
